label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out the best title for this passage. So, the question is asking which of the four options (A to D) would be the most appropriate title. Let me read through the passage again to get a good grasp. The passage starts by saying that if you want to see the effects of global warming, you should head north, and Will Steger is going to take us there. Steger is a famous polar explorer and environmentalist who has been warning about global warming. He's leading a team on a dogsled trip across Ellesmere Island in the Canadian Arctic. They'll be sharing videos and stories online so people can follow their journey. The team includes some well-known adventurers. The passage mentions that climate change has already changed the Arctic's geography, making it harder to reach the North Pole by dogsled. The last part says that while climate change is happening, people can also change, and their willingness will determine Earth's future. Now, looking at the options: A) The Arctic Is In Danger B) Discoveries of the Arctic C) Sledding Through the Arctic D) Consequences of Global Warming The main theme here seems to be about showing the effects of global warming through Steger's expedition. The passage is about how they're going to the Arctic to document the changes caused by global warming. The title needs to encapsulate the purpose of the journey, which is to highlight global warming's impact. Option A talks about the Arctic being in danger. While the passage does mention the effects of global warming on the Arctic, the focus is more on showing those effects through the expedition rather than just stating the danger. Option B is about discoveries. The passage isn't really about new discoveries but about observing existing changes due to global warming. Option C is about sledding through the Arctic. The dogsled trip is part of the method they're using to get people to see the effects, but the main message isn't just about the journey itself; it's about the global warming angle. Option D is about the consequences of global warming. The entire passage is about showing the effects (consequences) of global warming in the Arctic through Steger's expedition. The last sentence also ties in how human actions can change the future, which relates to the consequences. So, the best title would be D) Consequences of Global Warming because the passage is centered on
